title: alpinia borraginoides
intro: Alpinia borraginoides, also known as the lesser galangal or Thai galangal, is a type of rhizomatous perennial plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which are believed to help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Alpinia borraginoides include reducing fever, relieving digestive problems, and treating respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Alpinia borraginoides can be found in teas, infusions, and traditional remedies, often combined with other herbs for enhanced effects.
